title: P0 Solar KB Default QMD Fallback
evidence: solar-knowledge-context.py exists but returns empty hits for query 大模型热力学.
qmd search in collection solar-wiki returns qmd://solar-wiki/synthesis/大模型热力学-thermodynamics-of-large-models.md.
obsidian_vault_index is absent from ~/.solar/solar.db, so DB-only retrieval misses vault content.

history.note: Created P0 contract to make default Solar KB retrieval fall back to qmd solar-wiki when Solar DB/FTS misses.
handoff_to=planner; standard topology due narrow write surface in retrieval script/hook.
PRD written by PM (战略家+治理官双签). Validate.sh PRD: PASS. Ready for planner pickup.

history.reason: A1-A6 全部实测通过: A1 hits=5 含 4 qmd:solar-wiki + 1 obsidian_vault_index; A2 hook 注入 <solar-knowledge-context> 标签 695B; A3 QMD_BIN 不可达时 exit 0 + 合法 JSON; A4 SOLAR_KB_CONTEXT=0 → 0 字节; A5 max-chars=500 精确遵守; A6 regression 8/8 PASS. 6 次否证均未推翻 (qmd 路径真生效 / 无 false positive / 空 payload graceful / 无 mock / hook 调对 retriever / runbook 4 维齐全). 2 个 low-severity 备注 (D4 dispatch injection deferred 到 follow-up; CJK 关键词 extract heuristic 待扩 corpus).

history.note: Retriever ranking refined so real knowledge pages suppress raw sprint artifact evidence for semantic prompts. Verified py_compile, hook output, and 8/8 regression tests.
